docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANNEHILL, BUNNY ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT ESTATE OF GERDA KIRCHER KIRCHER PROPERTIES, A BUSINESS OF UNKNOWN FORM DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-02-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-29-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-16-2012
